title: Harris Seriously Good Angled Woodwork Gloss Paint Brush 1"
features: Harris Seriously Good 1" Angled Woodwork Gloss Paint Brush
Ideal for general painting with gloss, satin & eggshell paints
Designed for use on interior woodwork
Perfect for small areas and precision details
description: The Harris Seriously Good range offers quality brushes, rollers and tools that perform well without too much effort, they give a great finish and the brushes in this range come with their patented No-Loss technology. The 1"/25mm is specifically designed and engineered to give you seriously good results when painting with gloss, satin & eggshell paints. The angled brush head gives controlled paint application along edges, into corners and cutting in. It's small size is Perfect for painting thin flat sections of wooden trim, such as skirting boards, stair banisters, doors and door architraves. Guaranteed no bristle loss* and suitable for use with all gloss, eggshell and satin paints. *Bristle loss may occur if left to soak, or in a damp area.
